items.title: CATL's Profit Surges 42% With Global Battery Demand and the Shift to a Zero-Carbon Future

items.title: Pyrolysis Units for Battery Recycling Market Driven by Surging End-of-Life EV Batteries to 2035

items.title: Sulfide coating boosts lithium-ion battery lifespan past 1,000 cycles

이 전해질은 배터리의 효율성과 안정성을 크게 향상시킬 것으로 기대됩니다.
